summary:
Iteration 8 fully verified. Backend: 8/8 new pytest tests pass (test_iteration8.py). Frontend: all 5 critical flows (designer page, size matrix, layers/upload, checkout→Stripe redirect, admin CRUD, TeamKitConfigurator copy) verified end-to-end against the live preview URL.

Backend results (test_iteration8.py):
- GET /api/designer/products → exactly 8 products with id set {personalised-tee, personalised-hoodie, kids-tee, polo-shirt, workwear-tshirt, workwear-sweatshirt, school-hoodie, sports-tee}, each carrying print_area={x,y,w,h} and non-empty sizes array ✓
- GET /api/admin/designer-products → 29 products total, exactly 8 with designer_enabled=true ✓
- PATCH /api/admin/designer-products/personalised-tee with new print_area persists; subsequent GET /api/designer/products reflects updated x=10/w=60 ✓. Unknown product → 404, out-of-range coord (x=-1) → 400. Restored to defaults after test. ✓
- POST /api/designer/artwork (tiny PNG data URL) → returns {id}; GET /api/designer/artwork/{id} returns full doc with matching artwork_png, items_count, product_id ✓
- Validation: empty artwork_png → 400; >6MB payload → 400; unknown product_id → 400 ✓
- Regression: /api/products returns 29; team-kits/addons and fight-night/addons IDs unchanged; designer checkout flow with design_meta.artwork_id propagates to Stripe (200 + Stripe URL) ✓

Frontend results:
- /design-your-own: page loads, designer-product dropdown shows exactly 8 options in the expected order, design-print-area dashed rectangle rendered on canvas ✓
- Adding 'HELLO' via designer-text-input + designer-add-text → layers-list shows 1 item; text bounding box is auto-fit (inline-block + nowrap) ✓
- Switching to polo-shirt resets totals to £0.00; switching back to personalised-tee, clicking designer-size-M-plus 2× + designer-size-L-plus 1× → M qty=2, L qty=1 (separate buckets, NOT combined), designer-total=£20.97 = 3×£6.99 ✓
- Uploading a 1×1 PNG via the hidden file input behind designer-upload-btn → layers-list grows to 2; clicking a layer-{id} reveals selected-properties panel ✓
- Clicking designer-checkout fires POST /api/designer/artwork (1 request) + POST /api/checkout/session (1 request); browser redirects to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_… showing £20.97 ✓
- /admin/designer-products: dp-list shows all 29 products; filter 'polo' narrows to 2; toggling dp-enabled-workwear-jacket reveals dp-x/y/w/h inputs; editing values + dp-save-personalised-tee triggers PATCH and shows 'saved' toast ✓
- /product/football-kit-bundle (TeamKitConfigurator): extra-prints-block now contains the new copy: 'Back print sits below the player's name & number — names & numbers are already included in your kit price.' ✓

issues: React console warning: hydration error — '<%s> cannot be a child of <span> option'. Cosmetic only, not blocking, but worth investigating in BoldNavbar/select component.

action_items: (Cosmetic) Investigate React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> (appears on /product/football-kit-bundle). Likely from a select element with an icon/span inside <option>. Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L344-357: _DESIGNER_DEFAULTS correctly carries 8 products, with polo-shirt having a custom print_area {28,26,44,40}. Startup hook merges Mongo overrides via _merge_designer_overrides — clean pattern.
PATCH /admin/designer-products validates 0<=val<=100 for x/y/w/h and persists to db.designer_settings + updates in-memory PRODUCTS so changes take effect immediately without restart — well-designed.
/designer/artwork enforces 6MB upper bound and unknown product → 400 with correct error messages.

DesignYourOwn.jsx composeArtwork() renders all items onto a transparent canvas at both 1000 and 2000 px (preview + print). Items_count and artwork_id flow through to Stripe metadata via design_meta.artwork_id — verified end-to-end.
Designer text items use inline-block + white-space:nowrap + no fixed width → bounding box correctly auto-fits the rendered text (no more giant invisible rectangle from iter-7 issue).
AdminDesignerProducts.jsx uses correct data-testids (dp-list, dp-filter, dp-{id}, dp-enabled-{id}, dp-x/y/w/h-{id}, dp-save-{id}) and only reveals print-area inputs when designer_enabled is true.
seed_data_creation: Designer artwork docs persisted in MongoDB during testing (a few transparent PNGs from /designer/artwork POSTs). One real Stripe TEST-MODE checkout session created for personalised-tee 3×£6.99 = £20.97.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. test_iteration8.py covers 8 designer-related tests. Designer route is /design-your-own (in addition to /design). Tiny base64 PNG (transparent 1×1) is enough for /api/designer/artwork POSTs. Sleep ≥6s after clicking designer-checkout — composeArtwork renders to canvas at 1000 and 2000 px which takes a moment before the artwork POST + checkout POST + Stripe redirect chain completes.
rca of the issue: No defects. Iteration 8 delivers all spec items cleanly: 8-product designer feed, admin CRUD with print-area validation (0-100% per coord), transparent-PNG artwork upload + retrieval (with 6MB cap), composed PNG → artwork_id propagation to Stripe metadata, separate size-quantity matrix buckets, layers panel with per-layer delete, and the TeamKitConfigurator copy clarification.
